headline: 2 Reasons to Like GLW (and 1 Not So Much)
summary: Corning has been on fire lately. In the past six months alone, the company’s stock price has rocketed 71.3%, reaching $164.36 per share. This performance may have investors wondering how to approach the situation.

headline: Photonics Is the New Hot Cake of AI Infrastructure Space: 5 Picks
summary: Photonics is powering AI infrastructure as data-center bandwidth surges, putting GLW, LITE, COHR, MTSI and MRVL in focus.

headline: Cramer Backs BlackBerry, Waves Off Transocean And Sends AI Investors To Corning
summary: Jim Cramer says BlackBerry is good, achieving a major cloud security milestone. He advises going to Corning for Applied Optoelectronics.
